subject: Re: Construction Impediments
body:
what is das position on  road work


----- Original Message ----
From: John Amerling <john_amerling@earthlink.net>
To: J. Epstein <jeeproject@yahoo.com>
Sent: Thursday, July 5, 2007 11:49:06 AM
Subject: Construction Impediments


In candor the following items are in the way of progress on construction and permitting:
 
Approval of using the existing main road from the existing RO area past the gym to the area of the new house and library for all underground utilities, including those to feed the temporary house site, and doing the work right now; Lafayette local is in conflict with DAS on this issue;
R/O – Generator Building : work order for Maguire and JEE concept approval are needed to move the design and permit process; in hands of DAS;
Temporary House: approval of concept by JEE needed; in hands of DAS;
Barging: shift control to Lafayette Local and wean LSJ of reliance on Rampino: see earlier e mail on Boyson
 
Please contact me at your convenience for details and/or questions which you may have. 
 
Lafayette Contractors LLC
6100 Red Hook Quarter, Suite A2-7
St. Thomas, VI 00802
Tel: 340 779-8054
Fax:340 779-8055
Cell:340 690-7194
